text: Bade bhai hone ke naate mujhe property ka kam hissa mila taaki chote bhai ki engineering ki fees bhar saku, par main shikayat nahi kar sakta. UPSC prep ke saath-saath mujhe part-time kaam bhi karna pad raha hai kyunki ghar ka bojh mujh par hi hai. Main thak gaya hoon par rukne ka option nahi hai, mujhe bas endurance dikhani hai.

Ghar walon ne chote bhai ko property ka bada share diya taaki wo settle ho jaye, aur mujhse bola gaya hai ki main 'dropper' hokar bhi unki umeed banoon. Main exhaustion ki hadd paar kar chuka hoon, par mujhe bina ruke mocks dene hain taaki unka investment waste na ho. Main afford nahi kar sakta ki main haar maan jaun, yahi mera farz hai.

Papa ne saari zameen bhai ke naam kar di taaki uska future secure rahe, aur mujhe bola ki main apni mehnat se PSC nikalun. Main mentally toot chuka hoon par mujhe din-raat library mein baithna hi hoga kyunki poore joint family ki izzat meri naukri par tiki hai. Main ruk nahi sakta, endurance hi meri akeli pehchan bachi hai.

Bhai ko property milne par 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta mein main chup raha aur ab coaching ki fees khud manage kar raha hoon. Main itna thak gaya hoon ki lagta hai gir jaunga, par bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki aap thak kar bhi ruk nahi sakte. Meri kurbani hi bhai ka rasta saaf karegi, isliye mujhe ye duty bina sawaal kiye nibhani hai.

Multi-year prep ka bojh aur property batwara mein na-insafi ke bawajood main hamesha 'cannot afford to stop' wali state mein rehta hoon. Mujhe chote bhai-behen ke liye rasta banana hai, chahe meri apni ambition kurban ho jaye. Mere emotions secondary hain, mera kaam sirf endurance dikhana aur parivaar ki structural stability banaye rakhna hai.
